title: Zulay Kitchen Soup Ladle Spoon - Large Silicone Ladle for Gravy, Salad Dressing & Pancake Batter
features: QUALITY THAT LASTS: This sturdy ladle is made of high-quality, non-toxic nylon that makes it ideal for long-term use. Not only is it safe for non-stick, glass, and enamel-coated cookware, but the heat-resistant material is also ideal for use with hot food (up to 400°F/240°C).

LARGE SOUP LADLE: With a capacity of 4 oz, this ladle is perfect for pouring mouthwatering soups from your pot to the bowl. The unique head design is ideal for scraping along the sides and bottom of any pot. This ladle with a pour spout also allows you to easily serve sauces and soup without any spills.

COMFORTABLE GRIP: This ladle spoon is designed with an ergonomic handle that provides a secure grip for both left and right handers. It comes with a hanging hole for convenient storage and drying. Use this soup scoop to cook and serve vegetables, soups, chili, stews, and pancake batter.

EAST TO CLEAN: This gravy ladle can be cleaned by simply placing it in the dishwasher or running it under water. Give this as a gift to your family, or make this part of your everyday cooking routine; our nylon soup ladle will not disappoint!

HASSLE-FREE, ZULAY GUARANTEE: We are a Family Owned USA Business that believes in providing customers with the best-quality products. Our kitchen ladle is backed with a lifetime warranty. If there are any issues, contact us, and we will make it right.
